calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mary Mayo appearing for original petitioner Andre Turner. Steven Sager appearing for one of the proposed co-administrator Corlette Balestier. Parties have agreed to co-administrators with limited authority. Declaration of the missing heirs submitted. Ms. Mayo requested the Court to assist in getting seal records to locate Murphy V. Watson. Court is dispensing with notice to Murphy V. Watson and Jabar Watson. Order signed. Petition shall continue efforts to locate heirs and will give notice if located. Matter granted. Bond is fixed in the amount of $10,000.00. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Drocco.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-29-2007 Continued To Jun-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Corlette Balestier, daughter and Oscar Vincent, stepson appeared in Court to object to the petition. Her other siblings are also objecting. Matter is continued to 6/12. Court advised parties to seek counsel. They will need to file written objections.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.
